id.description: The unique identifier for the benchmark scenario.

type.description: The type of the benchmark scenario.

description.description: A description of the benchmark scenario.

reference_data.description: Reference data of the benchmark, to compare actual results with.

reference_options.description: Options to fine-tune how actual and reference results should be compared.

backend.description: The backend URL to connect to.

process_graph.description: The openEO process graph to execute.

job_options.description: Batch job options to use when creating an openEO batch job.
